entities.name: NIGERIA

entities.description: One of the Nigerian states where the study was conducted

entities.name: KATSINA STATE
entities.description: One of the Nigerian states where the study was conducted

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where strict gender division of labor in agriculture is noted

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: GENDER DIVISION OF LABOR
entities.description: The distribution of agricultural tasks between men and women

entities.name: FOOD CONSERVATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Methods used by households to maintain food availability throughout the year

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY INDEX
entities.description: A metric (Zi) used to measure the food security status of farming households

entities.name: HARVARD ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A tool used to assess distinctive gender roles in communities

entities.name: MALE FARMERS
entities.description: Men who perform farming-related activities

entities.name: WOMEN FARMERS
entities.description: Women who perform harvesting, pounding, threshing, and variety selection

entities.name: HARVESTING
entities.description: The activity of gathering crops from the field

entities.name: POUNDING
entities.description: A post-harvest processing activity

entities.name: THRESHING
entities.description: A post-harvest processing activity

entities.name: VARIETY SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting specific crop varieties

entities.name: STAPLE FOODS
entities.description: Main sources of carbohydrates consumed daily by households

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATES
entities.description: Nutrients provided by staple foods

entities.name: PROTEIN SOURCES
entities.description: Nutrients derived from either plant or animal sources

entities.name: PLANT SOURCES
entities.description: Plant-based sources of protein

entities.name: ANIMAL SOURCES
entities.description: Animal-based sources of protein
